level_signals: Base salary range $200K-$260K signals senior-level IC
Owns entire product-led growth funnel independently
'High autonomy and direct collaboration with leadership' implies senior contributor
No explicit years of experience stated

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Experience in growth, product management, product marketing, or analytics.
Strong analytical skills with experience using SQL, analytics tools (Amplitude, Mixpanel, etc.), and running rigorous experiments. You should be part data analyst, part marketer, and part PM
Design, prioritize, and execute A/B tests and growth experiments. Analyze results to extract insights and scale winning initiatives.
Identify opportunities to drive growth across acquisition, onboarding, activation, retention, monetization, and referrals.
Dive deep into analytics to understand user behavior, segment audiences, and uncover growth levers. Build dashboards and frameworks to track performance and guide decision-making.
Comfortable with ambiguity and moving fast. You find creative solutions with limited resources and aren't afraid to get your hands dirty.

Highly organized and methodical. You effectively maintain and prioritize experiment backlogs and tracking systems that keep fast-moving initiatives on schedule while ensuring transparency with dependent stakeholders.
Strong communication and stakeholder management skills

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Proven track record in high-growth startup environments
Experience at AI/ML companies or with usage-based pricing models
Experience with no-code or workflow automation tools (Zapier, Make.com, etc)

scope.surface: Product-led growth funnel: acquisition, onboarding, activation, retention, monetization, referrals for Lindy AI assistant
scope.business_model: B2C AI assistant product, likely freemium or usage-based pricing
core_responsibilities: Own and optimize product-led growth funnel from acquisition through activation and retention
Identify opportunities across acquisition, onboarding, activation, retention, monetization, and referrals
Build dashboards and frameworks to track performance and guide decision-making
Design, prioritize, and execute A/B tests and growth experiments
Partner with Engineering, Design, and GTM to build and launch growth features

green_flags: Compensation range explicitly disclosed and highly competitive ($200K-$260K base + equity)
Visa sponsorship and up to $20K relocation assistance offered
High autonomy and direct collaboration with leadership explicitly called out
Clear ownership of full growth funnel — not a vague remit
Small, fast-moving team signals real impact and scope
red_flags: 4+ days/week in-office in San Francisco required — eliminates remote and hybrid candidates
No minimum years of experience stated, making seniority expectations ambiguous
Very broad 'Experience in growth, product management, product marketing, or analytics' requirement could mean the bar is unclear at screening

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from comp range $200K-$260K and full funnel ownership scope)
scope.business_model (inferred from product description and mention of usage-based pricing in nice-to-haves)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (not explicitly stated; inferred from responsibilities)
ambiguities: No minimum years of experience stated anywhere in the JD; seniority is inferred entirely from compensation and responsibilities.
'Experience in growth, product management, product marketing, or analytics' is listed under 'Who You Are' without a 'Required' label — treated as hard given the unconditional phrasing in context.
Equity form not specified (options, RSUs, etc.).
